transcript.text:
This is a lot of food. I can't even explain it. It's too much
We can't even eat this
I don't know. It might take like 10 people to finish it
*A Giant Shadow Approaches...
*What is today's mukbang menu?
An enormous pizza!
Thank you
That's about 75~80cms in diameter
*Upgrade Pizza's own specialty pizza
*Creating the King of kings
*A creation of Giant Pizza. Only for Tzuyang!
*Beyond your wildest dreams
That is massive
They put in hard work in making this!
*Whole Garlic Bulgogi Pizza, Hot Chicken Shrimp Pizza, Handmade Sweet Potato Pizza, Cheese Fry Pizza
That's 75cm. A bit longer

I will give it a try
Bon Appetit!
*1 slice is almost like a whole pie
I will go ahead and start!
*Endorphins level goes up
It's delicious
The first bite is always the best for pizza slices
I can't finish all of this. I'm going for half
I'm just going to taste test every slice
*That's roughly about 5 Large pizzas
This is Hot Chicken Pizza
It has chicken and shrimp. Tastes really good
*A beautiful combination of chicken and shrimp
*Addictive level 100
Very delicious
*1 big bite

It's really good
It has a kick to it
The chicken is very tender
The shrimp
The chicken and shrimp go really well
I think this will cover my entire face
*Hiding behind the pizza blanket
How does it taste?
It's a chicken and shrimp pizza with a little kick to it
It's not spicy
*A perfect combination of Land and Sea
Very delicious
*Now it looks like a regular-sized pizza slice
The crust tastes so good
Fold it
Dipping sauce

That's good as well
Let's go this way
I thought this was the slice but it's over here
It won't cut
That's huge
Delicious
The bulgogi tastes good
I want to fold this but I feel like I need to fold it twice
Let's do it 3 times
The bulgogi
There are piece of whole garlic in here
The sweetness of bulgogi and the garlic go really well together
*Can't get used to how big the pizza is
I would say this is a regular slice of pizza
For a large pizza
*Pizza will be tasty no matter how you eat it

I didn't know but the dipping sauce is where it's at
It's very good
The sauce is not grease
Yummy
I can't turn it
I have to stand up to get to the other side
Sweet potato pizza this time
This one cut easily
Sweet potato!
I love sweet potato
It has bacon, ham, sweet potato, olive, corn, green peppers, etc
Should I put some hot sauce on it?
I don't usually put hot sauce
This is going to take me like 3 hours to finish it all
Since this is 75cm, do 75 divided by 2
So 1 slice is 37.5cm long

*2 Slices = 1 Large Pizza
This is aged kimchi!
This is very addicting
*Finished 3 slices, going for the 4th
*Struggles to get a bite
Thank youy
*More kimchi
This slice has all of my favorite toppings
It has potato fries, bacon, and cheddar cheese
This one will get you full
So tasty
Total calories?
I would say like... 10,000+?
*0 calories if it's delicious
*Kimchi as a palate cleanser
I wonder how much this will cost if they decide to sell it

I'd assume like around 150,000 won? (~$123 USD)
That's right, they can't deliver this
We can use the cameraman's truck
I still don't think this will fit
Or you'd just have to put it on top of the car
*Let's just eat
You don't have to contemplate on which toppings to order
Because all of these 4 are delicious
So just order this pizza
They have a pizza that has 4 different types of toppings
I would always eat those
I taste tested 1 of each flavor just like how I said earlier
I'm also not good at eating pizza
So I will end it at 4 slices
I'm still hungry
*1 hour later

I bought everything I wanted to eat
I didn't think I could eat it all, but now I think I can because I digested everything
*I will eat a bit more because I digested everything
I only ate half of that pizza
Oh no, it's bloated
Before they get bloated
I'm going to eat some ice cream after this
I feel like I'm scooping ice cream from the stores
The ice cream scoop
